chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Misc. Application No.S- 170 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order on report of learned Addl.Registrar as flagged “A” 19.01.2018. Applicant Mst. Hanifa is present Respondent NO.5 is present Mr. Shahzado Saleem Nahiyoon A.P.G -=-=- It appears from the record that this Cr. Misc. application No.S- 170/2016 was disposed of vide order dated 23.5.2016 with certain directions. Now the Additional Registration of this court has submitted report available on record, showing that notices were issued to the parties for meeting of the children, but they did not appear before him. It also appears from the record that parties were appeared before the court on 19.1.2018 stating that they have resolve their dispute amicably outside the court, therefore, report submitted by the Additional Registration is taken on record and matter is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE A.Rasheed
